DESCRIPTION: Application Health & Security Analytics: Multi-cloud log ingestion via Kafka/Kinesis/Event Hubs/Pub/Sub. Best practices: Snowpipe Streaming with MAX_CLIENT_LAG=50s for optimal partition sizes, Dynamic Tables with dedicated warehouse and TARGET_LAG=1min, Search Optimization Service for log search, Time Travel (90-day) for forensics, Multi-cluster warehouse for dashboards, Secure Data Sharing for cross-team visibility.
